approved_outline.title: ViT: Vision Transformer Overview

approved_outline.title: Patch Tokenization: Breaking the Image into Patches
approved_outline.subtitle: Spatial decomposition, flattening, and linear projection

approved_outline.title: Worked Example: 224×224 Image with 16×16 Patches
approved_outline.subtitle: Counting patches, sequence length, and embedding parameters

approved_outline.title: Self-Attention: Computational Cost of ViT Layers
approved_outline.subtitle: QKV projections and attention scores scale with L² and D²

approved_outline.title: CLIP: Normalized Embeddings & Temperature Scaling
approved_outline.subtitle: L2 normalization, cosine similarity, and logit temperature control

approved_outline.title: CLIP Contrastive Loss: InfoNCE on Matched Pairs
approved_outline.subtitle: Pulling matched image-text pairs together, pushing non-matches apart

approved_outline.title: Worked Example: CLIP Loss on a 3-Pair Batch
approved_outline.subtitle: Computing softmax, cross-entropy, and averaging per-pair losses

approved_outline.title: Key Takeaways: ViT Tokenization & CLIP Learning
approved_outline.subtitle: Patches → tokens, contrastive alignment, temperature's role

turns.prompt: double check the patch numbers on the tokenization slides are right
turns.text:
Checking the patch numbers now against Problem 1 from the VLM file:

- Image: 224 × 224
- Patch size: 16 × 16
- Patches per side: 224 / 16 = **14**
- Total spatial patches: 14 × 14 = **196**
- With CLS token: 196 + 1 = **197 total tokens**

I'm verifying these appear correctly on the tokenization slides (title, slide 3 with the step-by-step example, and any other mentions). If any slides show different numbers, I'll correct them now.
